title: Assert `count_id(wire->name) == 0' failed (FLATTEN pass)
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

In yosys git, running:
`yosys -p "read_verilog -sv tests/svinterfaces/svinterface1.sv; hierarchy -check -top TopModule; flatten"`

Or (same thing):
`yosys -p "read_verilog -sv tests/svinterfaces/svinterface1.sv; synth_ice40 -top TopModule"`

Results in:
```
3. Executing FLATTEN pass (flatten design).
Using template $paramod\MyInterface\WIDTH=4 for cells of type $paramod\MyInterface\WIDTH=4.
<suppressed ~1 debug messages>
ERROR: Assert `count_id(wire->name) == 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:1529.
```

## Expected behavior

Should not crash with an assert.

## Actual behavior

Asserts in `RTLIL::Module::add(RTLIL::Wire *wire)`.

Just to be clear, the input file is a Yosys test, not something I wrote. I can't get interfaces to synthetize at all in my design with yosys.
Possibly related is the many warnings about every identifiers in the interface not being declared.
code_blocks:
3. Executing FLATTEN pass (flatten design).
Using template $paramod\MyInterface\WIDTH=4 for cells of type $paramod\MyInterface\WIDTH=4.
<suppressed ~1 debug messages>
ERROR: Assert `count_id(wire->name) == 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:1529.
